{{Infobox character
| name = Kalman
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Kalman is a man who travels by cart with his wife and son, [[Simon]]. During their travels, he has encountered supernatural phenomena, such as glowing spirits and potential work by [[Travelers]]. While managing a donkey and a cart containing supplies like salt and paper, Kalman has faced significant physical danger, including an encounter with a large, fiery insect-like monster. Despite suffering intense pain and injury during such conflicts, he has demonstrated remarkable resilience. He is the father of [[Simon]], who is frequently referred to by various figures as the son of Kalman.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kalman]] is [[Simon]]'s father.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kalman]] is severely burned by a fiery monster wasp.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kalman]] vanished from the [[Latari Forest]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is the son of [[Kalman]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Eldest]] [[Nye]] refers to [[Simon]] as the son of [[Kalman]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The son of [[Kalman]] wishes to challenge the graveyard.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kalman]] has a son.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Watch them kill your daughter, son of Kalman, and tell me how much protection they deserve.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“The son of Kalman wishes to challenge the graveyard, Master.”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
